title: FoodTweaker
description: A CraftTweaker addon that allows tweaking food stats
body:
This mod is obsolete in 1.16 because it's been implemented into CraftTweaker itself. For info check the documentation

This mod is an addon for the CraftTweaker. This mod allows you to change the stats of food items. The mod also contains compatability for the Sanity mod.
What you can change with this mod
  • Change the hunger amount.
  • Change the saturation.
  • Make food always edible.
  • Make food be seen as meat.
  • Add sanity to food. (With the Sanity mod installed)
For info about the CraftTweaker syntax you can check the Wiki
If you use AppleSkin you need to install AppleCore for this mod to show the right values.
